description: A new customer needs help migrating their data from a competitor's product.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data export from the legacy system to understand its structure and format.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant maps the fields from the old system to the fields in the new product.

nodes.task_description: Write and run transformation scripts to clean and reformat the legacy data to match the required import format.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant successfully prepares the data for migration.

nodes.task_description: Perform the data import into the customer's new account.

expected_outcome.value: The data is successfully imported into the product.

nodes.task_description: Run validation checks to ensure all data was migrated accurately and completely.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant verifies the integrity of the migrated data with the customer.
